recommendations.title: Magic
recommendations.overview: A ventriloquist is at the mercy of his vicious dummy while he tries to renew a romance with his high school sweetheart.

recommendations.title: Chaplin
recommendations.overview: An aged Charlie Chaplin narrates his life to his autobiography's editor, including his rise to wealth and comedic fame from poverty, his turbulent personal life and his run-ins with the FBI.

recommendations.title: Shadowlands
recommendations.overview: C.S. Lewis, a world-renowned writer and professor, leads a passionless life until he meets spirited poet Joy Gresham.

recommendations.title: A Bridge Too Far

recommendations.title: Cry Freedom

recommendations.title: In Love and War
